action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet-50 (30 epochs, domain-weighted, grayscale augmentation) reached 12.27% Quickdraw accuracy (val_acc 69.5%). Loss still decreasing but gains small. Analysis: ResNet-50 is too weak for this extreme domain gap; ViT-B/16 (AugReg) achieves ~17% in published DG. Decision: Switch to ViT-B/16 AugReg (86M), use AdamW, mixed precision, short 5-epoch run to measure speed/accuracy, then scale if promising. Submit eval in this iteration.
